Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION

Title: Authorizes the Freeport Bible Center to file an application for a retroactive real property tax exemption with the county of Nassau assessor
Summary: Authorizes the Freeport Bible Center to file an application for a retroactive real property tax exemption with the county of Nassau assessor for all applicable taxes from the 2026 assessment roll.
ActClause: AN ACT to authorize the Freeport Bible Center to file an application for a retroactive real property tax exemption with the county of Nassau assessor
